channel.title: Nam Pham — AI notes and essays
channel.description: Practical notes on NLP, RAG, AI agents, and ML systems.

item.title: A practical evaluation loop for RAG assistants
item.description: A lightweight workflow for measuring retrieval quality, answer quality, and regressions before users discover them.

item.title: What makes healthcare chatbots difficult
item.description: Notes on trust boundaries, source quality, and escalation paths for healthcare assistants.

item.title: Designing an appointment scheduling agent
item.description: A simple architecture for tool-calling agents where every action needs validation, logging, and rollback.
